title: There is no "add fields" button in the "view settings" pane in the "board" view on a new app
excerpt: Following this tutorial: https://apps.developer.monday.com/docs/quickstart-view - I get to Part 3, step 2: “On the “View Settings” pane on the right, select the blue “Add Field” button. This will let you add a new field …

posts.author: iateadonut (Donal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Following this tutorial: https://apps.developer.monday.com/docs/quickstart-view - I get to Part 3, step 2: “On the “View Settings” pane on the right, select the blue “Add Field” button. This will let you add a new field to your feature’s settings.”

There is no “Add Field” button on my screen:

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @iateadonut

My warmest welcome to the community! Thanks for reaching out.

It seems like you are currently in Preview mode, and not Edit mode. Changing to Edit mode should solve the issue for you, and show the Add fields button

image610×1440 56.8 KB

On Preview mode, the option won’t display:

image598×1504 54.1 KB

I hope this helps clarify.

-Alex

posts.author: iateadonut (Donal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, you’re right.

I was looking for a blue bootstrap-esuue button, so I guess I overlooked the plain text button.

Thanks.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
